description: The worker classified all RuntimeExceptions as permanent, incorrectly failing transient storage/network errors instead of retrying.
fix: Introduced typed exception taxonomy (StorageException, TransientStorageException, CorruptImageException, etc.) and wrapped processing logic to retry transient storage errors while failing permanent corrupt/unsupported images.

description: Production media public URLs could default to localhost/127.0.0.1 or invalid schemes.
fix: Added strict scheme and host validation to StorageService constructor which fails container boot fast in production if localhost, 127.0.0.1, or non-https is used.

description: Photo deletion happened synchronously in the administration request thread, making it non-recoverable on transient failures and leaving state in DELETING.
fix: Refactored deletion to mark status DELETING in a transaction and dispatch an asynchronous, idempotent CleanupPlacePhotoFiles command. The handler deletes files safely and is fully retryable.

description: S3 adapter lacks a public URL contract where public variants are visible but original source files are private.
fix: Enforced public URL contract via STORAGE_S3_PUBLIC_URL configuration parameter, separating private sources from public responsive variants.

description: ProcessPhotoHandler used error suppression @getimagesizefromstring and lacked structured worker exception logging.
fix: Removed error suppression and added structured logging including photo_id, place_id, generation, stable failure code, and exception class.

description: Certification metadata start SHA did not align with latest upstream merge candidate states.
fix: Updated preflight and certification manifests with real start SHA and implementation branch tree.
